raw_consumer_statement:
I am reporting fraudulent transactions on my Citibank account totaling {$100.00}. A {$5.00} test charge and a {$100.00} withdrawal occurred in Oregon while I was physically located in XXXX, California, working remotely from home. I did not authorize these transactions and did not possess the card used. 

I notified Citibank and requested a fraud investigation and reimbursement under the Electronic Fund Transfer Act. I am requesting that Citibank immediately reverse the unauthorized charges and confirm that my account information has been secured Citibank mailed a few letters wasting time and denied my claim about three times. The transaction occured on XX/XX/XXXX. See charge information below : XX/XX/XXXX Debit PIN Purchase XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX. 
I called Citibank back in XXXX of fraudulent activities and they also emailed me confirming fraudelent activities. This was my fourth card I received from citibank for fraudulent activities.
